WO-JULES-ROOT-MIGRATION.title: Automated Root Migration & Path Refactoring
WO-JULES-ROOT-MIGRATION.instruction_raw: Execute the structural realignment per the spec. 1. Audit codebase for hardcoded paths. 2. Move files/folders. 3. Verify simulation entry points. DO NOT commit large .db files; ensure they remain ignored in their new location.

WO-IMPL-MEM-LEAK.title: IMPL: Resolve Global Audit Leaks and Agent Bloat
WO-IMPL-MEM-LEAK.instruction_raw: Implement the architecture fixed specified in WO-SPEC-MEM-LEAK.md. Replace the globally unbound `GLOBAL_WALLET_LOG` with a safe, bounded tick logger that flushes, or wipe it during `conftest.py` teardowns. Refactor core agent configs to transition business logic engines to Singleton (SEO pattern) rather than strictly instantiating them per Household agent in `AgentCoreConfigDTO`. Follow `mission-doc-restructure` principles closely.
